profile.name: Demid Vetoshkin
profile.info: Engineer and web developer. I've been writing code for a few years now, used to taking projects all the way and owning the result. I care about clean code and interfaces that are genuinely nice to use. Mostly React, Next.js, TypeScript and NestJS.

projects.title: Vuscan.net
projects.description: Online scanning of Internet resources for vulnerabilities, SQL injections, CMS and security errors. The application has integrated a system for parsing open and closed systems, as well as the CtyproCloud payment system.

projects.title: Bank.ir
projects.description: The client of the banking application on React Native. The program provides authorization by phone number and the possibility of transfer to other banking systems.

projects.title: Quiz
projects.description: A service for automatic diagnosis of equipment malfunctions and registration of repair requests. The user selects the device, describes the problem, and the system makes a preliminary diagnosis and creates an order.

projects.title: Spyq.net
projects.description: SpyQ.net — It is an intelligent B2B platform that helps businesses find target customers through the analysis of web resources. The service automatically crawls thousands of sites in selected niches, identifies relevant sites and places spot alerts on them with your commercial offer.

projects.title: Hakuba.ai
projects.description: Hakuba.ai — an AI-powered platform for generating videos from static photos. Users upload an image, describe the desired animation, and the neural network creates dynamic video content in minutes. Features include Yandex OAuth and phone number authorization, payment gateway integration, and a feedback form.

projects.title: Doctiff
projects.description: A service for automatic generation of business documents: completion acts, invoices, and contracts. AI fills in templates based on a text description of the deal and auto-populates requisites from the user's profile.

projects.title: EnverAI
projects.description: A platform for AI-powered image and video generation. Users describe a scene in text, select an AI provider, and receive the result in seconds. Features include subscription plans, generation history, user profile, and a support system.

contact.title: Let's collaborate
contact.label: contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? My inbox is always open.
